# FloorPricer

> Algorithmic trading platform. Set floors, build ladders, automate entries and exits. Paper trading is free.

## What we do
FloorPricer provides floor-based trading strategies, trailing stops, ladder buys, and portfolio analytics. Multi-broker support via Alpaca API. Paper trading with real market data. Strategy marketplace for sharing and copying community strategies.

## Features
- Floor monitoring with alerts
- Ladder buy automation
- Trailing stop management
- Portfolio analytics and risk cockpit
- Strategy builder and marketplace
- Multi-broker command center

## Links
- Website: https://floorpricer.com
- MCP tools available in Claude Desktop

## MCP connector
```json
"floorpricer": {
  "command": "npx",
  "args": ["-y", "@anthropic-ai/mcp-remote",
    "https://solvinghealth.com/mcp"]
}
```
